Notice Of Motion And Omtion To Stay Of Deft Gayle Bloomingdale
Off Calendar Nov-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paula Meyer, Esq. of Paula Meyer & Assoc., 714-744-6400 for defendant and moving party Gayle Bloomingdale
Robin James, Esq. of Michaelman & Robison, 415-882-7770 for plaintiff and opposing party Evanston Insurance Company
Donald Margolis, Esq. Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3853 for defendant City and County of San Francisco
Court Call Appearance: Richard Lam, Esq. of Alvarez-Glasman & Colvin, 562-699-5500 for Defendants, City of Pomona, City of Montebello and City of West Covina

Ruling:
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling:
DEFENDANT GAYLE BLOOMINGDALE'S Motion To Stay. GRANTED. Order signed in open Court. (Notice of Joinder filed on October 22, 2010 by defendant Barbara Wood was never put on calendar) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797 (302/PHA)
